description: Comparator compatibility decisions for Oracle/OceanBase source modes and OceanBase targets.

entries.rationale: TABLE column presence, VARCHAR/VARCHAR2 byte window, CHAR semantics exactness, defaults, nullability, identity, and visibility are supported by metadata compare.
ALTER TABLE ADD/MODIFY/default/nullability changes may lock, rewrite, or depend on target data state.
entries.manual_action_hint: Review generated table_alter SQL and target data before execution.

entries.rationale: VIEW DDL is generated from source DDL with remap and compatibility cleanup; invalid dependencies or DBLINK usage can require manual intervention.
entries.manual_action_hint: Review view compatibility details, prerequisites, and generated grants before execution.

entries.rationale: Trigger DDL may contain schema references, non-table targets, temporary-table semantics, or literal object paths requiring review.
entries.manual_action_hint: Review trigger detail reports and generated trigger SQL.

entries.rationale: Grant compatibility depends on target privilege catalog, object availability, and source grantor semantics.
entries.manual_action_hint: Review grant capability and unsupported grant reports before execution.

entries.rationale: Scheduler and job semantics are not certified for automatic execution in 0.9.x.
entries.manual_action_hint: Use generated artifacts as a conversion reference only.

entries.rationale: Materialized view compatibility varies by refresh mode and query features.
entries.manual_action_hint: Treat generated materialized view artifacts as manual review input.

entries.rationale: OB source mode uses 1:1 column type and length comparison without Oracle byte expansion.
OB source privilege extraction is supported but still depends on target catalog and runtime grantability.
entries.manual_action_hint: Review grant capability detail before execution.

entries.rationale: Existing-object ALTER COMPILE is the first-wave safe execution family.
